calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Vacated

Plaintiff Smule, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adam Thurston of Drinker Biddle & Reath telephone number 310-203-4039 for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Counsel for the Plaintiff stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. Plaintiff Smule, Inc.'s Motion To Compel is granted in part and denied in part (see order for full text). Order signed in open Court.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
